[@microsoft/fast-element/templating.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [TemplateValue](../fast-element.templatevalue/index.html)

## TemplateValue type

Represents the types of values that can be interpolated into a template.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type TemplateValue<TSource, TParent = any> = Expression<TSource, any, TParent> | Binding<TSource, any, TParent> | HTMLDirective | CaptureType;
```
**References:** [Binding](../fast-element.binding/)<!-- -->, [HTMLDirective](../fast-element.htmldirective/)<!-- -->, [CaptureType](../fast-element.capturetype/)
